scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @english-talks/shared && concurrently "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @english-talks/shared && npm run build --workspace @english-talks/web && npm run build --workspace @english-talks/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @english-talks/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @english-talks/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @english-talks/api
